cards.title: n8n RCE
cards.summary: [P1] n8n contains an improper control of dynamically managed code resources vulnerability, which is being exploited in the wild. No patch is available. Why now: Exploited in the wild (confidence: 0.90)

cards.title: curl HTTP Proxy Vulnerability
cards.summary: [P2] curl would wrongly reuse an existing HTTP proxy connection, potentially allowing unauthorized access. No patch is available. Why now: Newly disclosed vulnerability (confidence: 0.60)

cards.title: Name Directory Plugin RCE
cards.summary: [P2] The Name Directory plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Stored Cross-Site Scripting, potentially allowing unauthorized access. No patch is available. Why now: Newly disclosed vulnerability (confidence: 0.60)
